\item 
class \mbox{\hyperlink{classTriQuadPol}{Tri\+Quad\+Pol}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Polar $(\rho, \theta)$ quadrature generator on a triangular facet. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Polar quadrature on a single triangle around an observation point. 

Builds angular–radial integration segments in the triangle\textquotesingle{}s plane, then expands them via 1D Gauss rules to produce barycentric nodes and weights suitable for integrating singular/near-\/singular kernels. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{TriQuadPol_8h_source}{Tri\+Quad\+Pol.\+h}}.
